name: Product Launch Funnel
origin: Pioneered by Jeff Walker. Three pre-launch videos released days apart build anticipation; the 4th opens the cart. Brunson calls it a 'sideways Perfect Webinar' — the same content delivered across several days instead of one sitting.

whenToUse.summary: Use for a launch event to a warm list/audience where anticipation is built over several days with sequential content videos before a hard cart-open/cart-close window.
goals: Build anticipation and reciprocity with free pre-launch content
Deliver the Perfect Webinar 'sideways' across 3 videos before selling
Create a launch spike with a hard cart-open and cart-close window
signals: Client has a warm list/audience to launch to
Wants an event-style spike, not always-on selling
Offer benefits from anticipation and social proof in comments
Has time to release content over several days
antiSignals: Cold traffic with no relationship (warm them first)
No bandwidth to produce 3-4 quality videos

pageStructure.purpose: Open the loop with the big idea / new opportunity and capture the opt-in.
keyElements: Video 1: the big idea, the result that's possible, why now (Wow and How)
Comment section for engagement + social proof

pageStructure.purpose: Teach the process / case study so the dream feels achievable.
keyElements: Video 2: the transformation and the step-by-step process / case study
Recap of Video 1 + answer top comments

pageStructure.purpose: Future-pace the result of owning the solution and tease the cart open.
keyElements: Video 3: future-pace ownership, what life looks like with the solution
Answer objections / FAQ raised in comments
Cart-open date + 'reserve your spot / join the waitlist' tease

pageStructure.purpose: Open the cart, present the offer and price, and close with urgency.
keyElements: Video 4 / sales video: the offer, the Stack, the price

scripts: Videos 1-3 = Epiphany Bridge story arc spread 'sideways' (opportunity → process → ownership)
Video 4 / offer page = Perfect Webinar Stack & Close compressed into the sales video
Video hooks, comment prompts, subject lines = Copywriting Secrets
copyFramework.notes: It is literally a 'sideways Perfect Webinar': Wow-and-How = the hook + vehicle belief; Transformational Education = the internal/external belief breaks; Ownership Experience = future-pace; Video 4 = the Stack and close.

skill44Widgets: Video embeds on each content page
automations: Tag by which videos watched → tailored reminders
Cart-open email blast → cart-close 3 Closes (emotion/logic/fear) + last-call
Purchase → fulfillment + remove from launch sequence
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds the 4 pages and schedules the content release; Skill 44 generates the opt-in/waitlist form, the order form + bump, and both the cart-open and cart-close countdown timers that gate the launch window.
